item.description: Yes it works

item.description: Complete package

item.title: Vintage multi-function stereo system - $40 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Fisher stereo system: AM/FM tuner (works great!). turntable (not tested). 8-track (not tested). cassette player (not tested).

item.title: Vintage working Vector Research Stereo Receiver VR-7000 Made in Japan - $300
item.description: Vector Research components were designed in California and built in Japan to compete with NAD, Luxman, etc. TechHifi used to sell them, if you're old enough to remember."thevintagehifishack" says:* "One of those rare surprises, its sound is simply stunning and in more than one opinion it out performs many of the big names"* " Snappy and precise with enough power to back it up, the sound is zero coloration and ultra fast..Here are the base specs: WPC RMS /8 Ohms* 105 WPC RMS /4 Ohms* 220 WPC Dynamic power /8 ohms* 0.01% THD* Power Consumption Rated at 420 Watts* 1978, Japan* Dimensions: 17 1/2'' x 14 1/2'' x 5 1/4''.

item.title: Yamaha Stereo Receiver and Sony Speakers - $60 (North Kingstown)
item.description: Yamaha RX-V540 stereo receiver

item.title: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player - $80 (Cranston)
item.description: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player

item.title: Portable Turntable/Record Player - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: QSC USA400 Stereo Power Amp - $59 (Cranston)
item.description: QSC USA400. Tested and works.

item.title: Sansui D-X311WR Auto-Reverse Dual Cassette Deck - $59 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice Sansui D-X311WR auto-reverse dual cassette deck. Has Dolby B&C noise reduction and an MPX filter. Very nice condition. Works and is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Cool blast from the past for $59 firm.

item.title: Emotiva BASX PT-100 preamp stereo audophile sound system - $300 (Providence)
item.description: Great little audiophile quality pre-amp. USB interface for powered desktop speakers or powered stereo system. Specs can be found online, perfect condition unit includes original box, manual, packaging, dust cover, original remote, and cables.

item.title: Pioneer - Elite 980W 7.2-Ch. Hi-Res 4K Ultra HD and 3D A/V Receiver - $275 (Warwick)
item.description: Hello,

item.title: Onkyo rack system - $250 (Tiverton)
item.description: Audio Video Control amplifier, AM/FM receiver, 6 disc CD changer,

item.title: Complete Stereo System - $250 (Middletown)
item.description: ONKYO TX SR501/AV Stereo Receiver, ONKYO TA RW344 Stereo Tape Deck, PANASONIC Compact Disk Changer, pair of POLK AUDIO Model S6 Woodgrain Speakers (10"W x 21"H). Includes owner's manuals and remote controls. Excellent Condition

item.title: Polk Audio 6 speaker set wih Tuner, cd burner, cassette deck - $400 (Contoocook, NH)
item.description: 4 corner speakers, center speaker, sub woofer speaker. Sony amp receiver. Sony Dual cassette deck. Harmon Kardon CD burner. 200' speaker wire. Has been a fantastic system but thinking about upgrading. Only serious inquiries need to reply. Please email for original receipts more than 2300.00, manuals, pics and all paperwork. One owner only, me

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: Polk Audio T50 Slim Tower Stereo Speakers - $180 (Cranston)
item.description: Fantastic pair of Polk Audio T50 stereo speakers. Someone bought these and never used them so they are in excellent condition. Sleek design and a small footprint. Sound fantastic - crisp highs and full bass sound. These are a current model and sell for $250 each. I can demo them in my garage. Great deal on awesome speakers for $180 firm.

item.title: Polk Audio T15 Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $50 (Cranston)
item.description: Height 10.63" (27 cm)

item.title: RCA (Radio Shack) CAT# 40-5003 Compact Stereo Speakers - $40 (Cranston)
item.description: Great pair of RCA stereo speakers which were sold by Radio Shack back in the day. The cabinets and grills are metal and they are fairly heavy. They sound great for the small size and are in excellent condition. They were catalog # 40-5003. They are hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Cool speakers for $40 firm.

item.title: I Buy Vintage Stereo Equipment - Receivers, Speakers Etc... - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: I like to buy, tinker with and collect vintage stereo equipment. I like old receivers, speakers, turntables, tape decks, cd players etc... I'll even buy some broken stuff (depending what it is). Let me know what you have and where it is located. You can email me through craigslist or call or text the phone number that comes up when you click "reply" at the top left corner of my ad. Thanks, Bill

item.title: Mirage M-290 Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $75 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice pair of Mirage M-290 two way bookshelf stereo speakers. Very good sounding speakers. Good condition. grills included. Bi-wireable. Jumpers included for regular wiring. They are hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Great speakers for $75 firm.

item.title: Vintage Technics cassette deck player - $30 (Westerly ri)
item.description: From estate I bought

item.title: Denon Receiver - $200
item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.title: Wireless Speaker Kit - $25 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Experience high-quality audio with the RocketFish RF-WHTIB-A Wireless Rear Speaker Kit. It enables a wireless (not to be confused with WiFi) connection from a stereo receiver or TV, etc. to a set of speakers. Perfect for those situations in which wired connections are not possible.

item.title: Shure BLX4R Wireless system W/ Two SM35 Headset Mics - $349 (providence)
item.description: Great condition Shure BLX4R Wireless System.Comes with 2 Shure SM35 Head-set Mics. One the side cracked I taped it but bought a new one ($110.00) Both are included. It was Always racked so there is some scratches on the receiver from mounting it in the rack. but it was Never abused. Works 100% and comes with All original parts and original Packing.

item.title: KS-A16K JVC - $40 (North Providence)
item.description: Ks-a16k jvc Stereo power Amplifier new in box. If you have any questions feel free to contact me.

item.title: MARSHALL JCM 900 1960 LEAD CAB - $450
item.description: This is a vintage 1993 Marshall JCM 900 1960 Lead 4-12 Top Slant cab. All original, mono or stereo (with impedence selector), removable casters, and made in England.

item.description: VIZIO Sound Bar used works great has cosmetic issues but doesn't affect sound, remote missing back.

item.description: This is a radio control airplane. Receiver ready never used . Made for 22 lipo battery , not included Local pick up only.

item.title: Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder - $80 (West Warwick, RI)
item.description: The Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder comes with voice activation so you can utilize it "hands-free" recording if desired. It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.

item.description: Original owner, used only twice, ended up I didn't need it.

item.title: Garmin eTrex HC Series GPS Trail Navigation Device with all its extras - $35 (Providence, RI)
item.description: The Garmin eTrex Venture HC is a handheld GPS navigator with a high-sensitivity GPS receiver, a 2.2-inch, 256-color screen, and 24MB of internal memory. It also includes a basemap, geocaching capabilities, and supports a variety of optional maps.

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $16,999 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller.

item.title: technics amplifier with receiver and speakers - $125 (seekonk)
item.description: technics amp, 350 watt, model SU-V75 ( 17"Wx8.75"Dx3.75"H ), stereo receiver, 9 watt, model ST-S74 ( 17"Wx5"Dx1.75"H ) with two WIRED boston acoustics CR 75 bookshelf speakers (can be wall mounted) ( 7.75"Wx10"Dx12"H )

item.title: Turtle Beach Ear Force X12 Gaming Headset - Open Box - $29 (Providence)
item.description: Package Contents:

item.title: Tempus Radio Controlled Wall Clock - $25 (Seekonk)
item.description: Built-in receiver synchronizes to the government radio time signal.

item.title: KEF Q10 UNI-Q HOME STEREO SPEAKERS ( pair) - $300 (Lincoln)
item.description: For sale is an all original in very good condition pair of Kef Q-10 bookshelf home stereo speakers. I believe these speakers were manufactured around 1991 in the United Kingdom and are in very nice condition with all original drivers. They sound very nice but I have two pairs of them and I need to find one set a good home. I believe the impedance of these speakers is six ohms and so should work nicely with either a 4 ohm or 8 ohm system. They can be used as either a bookshelf or free-standing on speaker stands. In a smaller room they sound very full and require no subwoofer.

item.title: Elliptical Trainer - Vision S7100 - $800 (Providence)
item.description: Vision S7100 Suspension Elliptical

item.description: Additions

item.title: 2004 Harley Davidson 1200 Sportster - $3,000 (Cranston)
item.description: Harley Davidson 1200 sportster in excellent shape very low miles stereo system snap on and off windshield chaps riding accessories. Lots of extra chrome come check it out. It's spring people summer is right around the corner.

item.title: 2013 Palomino Maverick 2902 truck camper-reduced - $10,500 (North Attleboro)
item.description: 2013 Palomino Maverick 2902 truck camper. In great condition with one slide out. Weighs 2972 lbs 11,000 btu air conditioner, 20,000 btu heater, electric jacks. Full bathroom, queen size bed, optional larger fridge/freezer awning, electric inverter, dvd/tv/stove heated tanks Only adult used. Sleeps two, Queen size bed, kitchen (table folds down for additional sleeping area) TV, Stereo system with outdoor speakers. Electric jacks. Comes with cover. Call Bob for more information. $10,500

item.title: Receivers (Providence RI)
item.description: Receivers collectable on sale in Music House of Flea Market big Top, reasonable price.

item.title: Roland MOBILE AC Acoustic Guitar Combo new in box - $99
item.description: Roland MOBILE AC Acoustic Guitar Combo

item.title: Moving Estate Sale (Lincoln)
item.description: Great home, beautiful furniture: full bedroom sets,chairs, couches, tables and more. Home decor,yard tools, books, tapes, stereos, televisions and other items.

item.title: Fargen diagonal 2x12 cab with great speakers - $500 (North Providence)
item.description: Fargen oval open-back diagonal 2x12 cabinet in a sweet orange tolex with some fun fading patterns on it. Includes a WGS ET65 speaker in the bottom (American voicing with great low-mids) and Celestion Neo Creamback in the top (greenback-style upper mids and keeps the cabinet very light). Plug & play jack so you can run each 8 ohm speaker separately in stereo or both speakers in series (16 ohm) or in parallel (4 ohm).

item.title: Boss Linear stereo volume pedal - $90
item.description: We used this to control dynamics on our Beat Buddy drum machine in live performance bringing volume up or down as needed. Fits well on the pedal board.
